response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, along with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — all core requirements. His track record of building scalable systems, contributing to open-source platforms, and leading cross-stack projects strongly aligns with the role’s demands, despite limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of recent work with Kotlin/Java despite required secondary stack
German language proficiency is basic, may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
